title: Authorize L0 fixture and profile additions for 3 example agents
description: Add 3 new builtin profiles (umbrella, clothing-advice, daily-planning), 3 new seed fixture tools, and update seed_tool_risk.yaml to register the fixture tools. These L0 changes are infrastructure required for the governed self-evolution example agents.
rule_reference: Rule 3 — Do Not Modify Protected Areas Without Explicit Authorization
justification: The L0/CODE/profiles/builtin/ and L0/CODE/tool_gateway/ changes are necessary infrastructure to support the 3 bounded example agents (Umbrella, Clothing Advice, Daily Planning). These are not governance bypass changes — they add new fixture tools, profiles, and risk entries. No existing governance, policy, or sandbox logic is modified; only new entries are added.

changed_files.change: Added 3 new tool risk entries: weather.fixture.read, clothing.fixture.read, planning.fixture.read
changed_files.risk: low — adds deterministic read-only fixture tools

changed_files.change: New builtin profile for Clothing Advice Agent
changed_files.risk: low — bounded agent with restricted capabilities

changed_files.change: New builtin profile for Daily Planning Agent
changed_files.risk: low — bounded agent with restricted capabilities

changed_files.change: New builtin profile for Umbrella Agent
changed_files.risk: low — bounded agent with restricted capabilities

changed_files.change: Registered 3 new fixture tools in the seed tool registry
Added imports for 3 new fixture tool modules
New fixture tool: reads deterministic clothing advice test data
New fixture tool: reads deterministic planning test data
New fixture tool: reads deterministic weather test data

approval_evidence: All 9 changed files add new functionality only; no existing lines are modified except imports/registrations
No governance bypass, policy bypass, or sandbox bypass logic was touched
Changes are necessary for the 3 bounded example agents to function
